exercises.sentence: Yo ___ en casa hoy porque estoy cansado.
exercises.translation: I am staying at home today because I am tired.

exercises.sentence: Siempre ___ con mis amigos en el parque los sábados.
exercises.translation: I always meet with my friends at the park on Saturdays.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a dos cuadras de la estación de tren.
exercises.translation: I am located two blocks from the train station.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ muy bien con esa camisa roja.
exercises.translation: You look very good in that red shirt.

exercises.sentence: ¿A qué hora ___ tú con ellos?
exercises.translation: At what time are you meeting with them?

exercises.sentence: Tú no ___ lejos del centro de la ciudad.
exercises.translation: You do not live far from the city center.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ en el trabajo hasta tarde esta noche.
exercises.translation: He is staying at work late tonight.

exercises.sentence: El restaurante ___ cerca de mi apartamento.
exercises.translation: The restaurant is located near my apartment.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ satisfecho con el resultado final.
exercises.translation: He is left satisfied with the final result.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ en el hotel por tres días durante el viaje.
exercises.translation: I stayed at the hotel for three days during the trip.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ con ellos a las ocho de la noche.
exercises.translation: I met with them at eight o'clock at night.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ muy sorprendido con la noticia de ayer.
exercises.translation: I was very surprised with yesterday's news.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ en silencio durante toda la reunión.
exercises.translation: You remained silent during the whole meeting.

exercises.sentence: ¿En qué lugar ___ tú ayer por la tarde?
exercises.translation: Where did you meet yesterday afternoon?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ con el primer lugar en la competencia.
exercises.translation: You ended up with first place in the competition.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ en la oficina para terminar el reporte.
exercises.translation: He stayed in the office to finish the report.

exercises.sentence: El problema ___ resuelto después de mucho esfuerzo.
exercises.translation: The problem remained solved after much effort.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ impactado al ver el accidente en la calle.
exercises.translation: He was left shocked when seeing the accident on the street.

exercises.sentence: Yo siempre ___ en casa de mis abuelos los veranos.
exercises.translation: I always used to stay at my grandparents' house in the summers.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ con mi mejor amigo todos los fines de semana.
exercises.translation: I used to meet with my best friend every weekend.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ a pocas calles de mi escuela antigua.
exercises.translation: I used to live just a few blocks from my old school.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ en la cama por horas los domingos.
exercises.translation: You used to stay in bed for hours on Sundays.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ siempre en la esquina de la plaza.
exercises.translation: You always used to meet at the corner of the plaza.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ muy asustado cada vez que veías una película.
exercises.translation: You used to be left very scared every time you watched a movie.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ en el equipo después de cada partido.
exercises.translation: He used to stay on the team after every match.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ con ella casi todas las tardes.
exercises.translation: He used to meet with her almost every afternoon.

exercises.sentence: El edificio ___ lejos de todo en aquella época.
exercises.translation: The building was located far from everything back then.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ en casa si tuviera tiempo libre.
exercises.translation: I would stay at home if I had free time.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ con mis amigos si estuviera en la ciudad.
exercises.translation: I would meet with my friends if I were in the city.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ muy confundido si me dijeran eso.
exercises.translation: I would be left very confused if they told me that.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ más tiempo si pudieras viajar.
exercises.translation: You would stay longer if you could travel.

exercises.sentence: ¿Tú ___ con él aunque fuera tarde?
exercises.translation: Would you meet with him even if it were late?

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ satisfecha con este nuevo trabajo.
exercises.translation: You would be left satisfied with this new job.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ con nosotros si el jefe lo permitiera.
exercises.translation: He would stay with us if the boss allowed it.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ con ella en el cine a las siete.
exercises.translation: He would meet with her at the cinema at seven.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ sorprendido si ganara la lotería.
exercises.translation: He would be left surprised if he won the lottery.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ en este hotel durante todas mis vacaciones.
exercises.translation: I will stay in this hotel during all my vacations.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ con mis primos para almorzar el domingo.
exercises.translation: I will meet with my cousins for lunch on Sunday.

exercises.sentence: Yo ___ muy feliz cuando termine mi proyecto.
exercises.translation: I will be left very happy when I finish my project.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ en la universidad hasta la noche hoy.
exercises.translation: You will stay at the university until tonight.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ conmigo frente a la biblioteca pronto.
exercises.translation: You will meet with me in front of the library soon.

exercises.sentence: Tú ___ asombrado con el regalo de cumpleaños.
exercises.translation: You will be left amazed with the birthday present.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ en su oficina terminando el trabajo.
exercises.translation: He will stay in his office finishing the work.

exercises.sentence: Él ___ conmigo a las cinco en punto.
exercises.translation: He will meet with me at five o'clock sharp.

exercises.sentence: El problema ___ resuelto para el viernes.
exercises.translation: The problem will be left solved by Friday.
